desc: Bright 3 bed, 3.5 bath townhouse in Waterfront Community. New hardwood floors, gas fireplace, 42" maple cabinets. Master suite with sitting area and walk-in closet. 2-car garage. Close to NYC trains, buses, and highways.
description:
Bright and beautifully appointed 3-bedroom, 3.5-bath townhouse in the desirable Waterfront Community of South Amboy. This elegant home offers quality finishes throughout.

New hardwood floors run through the main living areas. The living room features a gas fireplace. The kitchen is appointed with 42" maple cabinets. The master suite includes a generous sitting area and walk-in closet. A 2-car garage completes the package.

Excellent location with easy access to NYC trains, buses, and major highways.
